creator: troff@paranoia.ru
text:
Current ickle 0.1.2 port includes <getopt.h>, which is not part of 
	the FreeBSD base system.

Fix: Here's the patch that fixes it.  The patch should be committed as
files/patch-examples::shell.cpp.



using namespace ICQ2000;
 using namespace std;--9V8FbAEYQydBz8B1BvaVV0EAn78gangljb8QRJ8NxqSK3wZE
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- examples/shell.cpp.orig     Mon Nov 26 14:30:42 2001
+++ examples/shell.cpp  Mon Nov 26 14:30:57 2001
@@ -11,7 +11,6 @@
 #include <sys/wait.h>
 #include <unistd.h>
 #include <signal.h>
-#include <getopt.h>
